files.description: Unit tests for PaymentService covering charge creation, refunds, and error handling

testFramework: xUnit was chosen as it is the most popular testing framework for modern .NET projects, with excellent async support and a clean attribute-based API.
mockingApproach: Moq is used for creating mock implementations of IStripeClient. This allows testing PaymentService in isolation without making real API calls.
nextStepSuggestion: Run a dependency audit to ensure your test packages are up to date.
nextStepDescription: You've added xUnit and Moq as test dependencies. The Dependency Audit tool can verify these packages are on their latest versions and check for any known vulnerabilities.
